changes.comment: crypto-utils: export the MultibaseSpkiPublicKeyRegExp shape pattern next to the existing MultibaseSpkiPublicKey brand/guard/converter (single source of truth for consumers that need the pattern directly), and widen importPublicKeyFromMultibaseSpki to accept a plain string so callers holding an unbranded value can import it without first branding. The isValidMultibaseSpkiPublicKey guard now requires a non-empty base64url body (rejects the degenerate 'm'), aligning it with the exported pattern; no real exported key is affected.
